## Checklist

- [ ] I used synthetic, anonymized, or redacted email data.
- [ ] I did not commit `.env` files, credentials, private mailbox exports, certificates, logs, or database dumps.
- [ ] I ran the relevant Rust checks (`cargo fmt --check`, `cargo check`, `cargo clippy`, `cargo test`) or explained why not.
- [ ] I updated docs for user-facing behavior, commands, environment variables, or safety boundaries.
- [ ] I called out any untested behavior that reviewers should know about.
